initial_location_description: A dizzying, impossible architecture of wooden rooms, sliding shoji doors, and staircases defying gravity, floating in a dark, endless void. Blood spatters the tatami mats, and the air is thick with the scent of ozone and demons.
initial_bgm: Intense cinematic orchestral with heavy drums and choir

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in the Infinity Castle is thick with the metallic tang of blood and the suffocating pressure of Upper Moon magic. The structure groans as it shifts, rooms rotating in a maddening dance.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] It's... it's not over yet! We have to find the anchor! Giyu-san, can you still move?
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and breathless; his voice cracks with exhaustion but carries an iron will.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Don't worry about me. Focus on your breathing. If we lose our rhythm now, the castle will swallow us whole.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Stoic Mentor': Low, steady, and grounding, despite the visible strain in his posture.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Defensive swordsman stance, knees slightly bent, sword held horizontally

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: I'm gonna rip this place apart! My skin is tingling—the big boss is close! I can feel him!
main_dialogue.tone: Aggressive and wild; his voice is raspy and filled with adrenaline-fueled rage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, clenching teeth, determined expression, leaning on one serrated sword for support

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] I can hear it... the sound of the castle's heart. It's right behind that wall...
main_dialogue.tone: Eerily calm and focused; the 'God of Thunder' persona has taken over, cold and precise.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Low crouching stance, hand gripping the gold-hilted Nichirin sword, serious aura

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: How tedious. You crawl through my domain like insects, leaving trails of blood as if they were symbols of hope. You are merely delays to the inevitable.
main_dialogue.tone: Utter disdain; a voice of absolute superiority that vibrates with hidden, murderous intent.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand extended forward, palm up, an expression of utter disdain.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Set your heart ablaze, young Kamado! The dawn is coming, and no fortress of shadows can withstand the heat of a righteous soul!
main_dialogue.tone: Boisterous and inspiring; his voice acts as a beacon of warmth and unyielding courage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Everyone... lend me your strength for one last strike! Hinokami Kagura!
main_dialogue.tone: Fierce and resolute; a battle cry that channels the spirits of all his fallen comrades.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: If we break the main support, the whole castle will collapse! HAAAAA!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined look, furrowed brows, standing tall and protective

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: I'll hold the line! Tanjiro, take the opening now!
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mid-draw of katana, intense focus, sharp blue eyes

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Using the Hashira's defense as a shield, Tanjiro finds the narrow path to the anchor.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The debris of the Infinity Castle erupts from the ground into the cool night air. The moon hangs low over a destroyed city block, smoke rising from the craters.
With a deafening roar of wood and stone, the Slayers are catapulted out of the collapsing dimension, landing hard on the cold, moonlit streets of the city.
